data.code:
version: '3.8'
services:
  revisium:
    image: revisium/revisium:{{ version }}
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: "postgresql://user:pass@db:5432/revisium"
    depends_on:
      - db
  db:
    image: postgres:17
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: {{ password }}
      POSTGRES_DB: revisium
